Comment: The table looks great. The delivery process is smooth and they assemble it for me. There are few defects on the table but Wayfair quickly resolved it for me.
I saw this at my friend’s house and I have to get it myself. Modern, soft look, I love it!

It is so pretty love it I like the storage on both side and the colour is very 
nice it is so modern and big enough for all my family

It’s a solid well built table, agree with comments on the orange tone but for our home it works well 
We plan to do light oak cabinets in the kitchen that it’s going in,  but honey oak floors vibe with the table.
Great table! The table top is thick and high quality, and it extends smoothly. The height is also just right. For the price, this is an amazing deal on a beautiful and functional dining table.
Table is beautiful and the added storage is great - waiting on my replacement parts to see how it looks without the damage
Cheap quality. Damaged from delivery. Returning the table today. Will not be ordering another one

It’s is an absolute beauty of a table and serves my purposes. I love that it extends to accommodate more guests. The only issue is that there was a chip in one of the pieces, but I think that’s from delivery and handling.

I had my eye on this table for a while and finally decided to purchase—it did not disappoint! I was a little worried it might feel cheap or lightweight, but it’s actually very sturdy and has a nice heavy quality. Assembly was quick and easy (washer, screw, righty tighty!) and everything came together smoothly. 

The only downside was that while opening one of the storage doors, the main part of the clasp broke off. I’m hoping I can glue it back on, but it was a bit of a letdown. Other than that, I’m very satisfied with the table overall. Now I just need to find the perfect modern mid-century dining chairs to go with it! 
 pictures of the table in different daylightS
Loved the look and the fact that it extended however, it was not real oak wood and it came with a lot of damages.
Looks like what I ordered! The delivery and set up was easy. Definitely love the cabinets underneath. More than enough space for entertaining.
Some scratches and i thought the inside of the cabinet was oak but it was not but overall, its a beaut.
Love it!!! Love it!!!!! Love it!!! Love it!!!! We’re still looking for chairs to match with it

This table extends from a comfortable 4-seater to a 12-seater. I searched extensively both locally and online, and this was the only table I found that offered that range. The material scratches easily, which is frustrating given the price. However, it is still worth it overall.
Adding the extension leaves is very easy and can be done by one person. The built-in storage is convenient but fairly small—best suited for light items like placemats or dessert plates. If you plan on extending the table frequently, keep in mind that only lightweight items should be stored in the compartments - as you would be moving the base frequently. 
Overall, I would recommend it.
My table arrived with a defect, but I was able to order the replacement parts very easyly using Wayfair’s chat service.
It’s great, but color is different from some pictures. It’s warm, even with cool lighting.
Very durable, works just as advertised, looks great in my space

This dining table is beautifully made and feels very solid. The wood has a natural, high-quality finish and the design looks clean and modern. I really like the extendable feature, which is easy to use and perfect for hosting guests. The hidden storage space is a nice bonus and very practical. Overall, it’s functional, stylish, and a great addition to our dining area
Comes mostly assembled, you just screw on the base to the top and are good to go! Seems to be good quality, only a couple nicksflaws but it’s heavy and sturdy and pretty.

We love this table but we did have issues when installing the doors. You can tell where the holes were drilled multiple times so it didn’t set properly until we made several adjustments. Over all we love the table and I would recommend.
